opportunities.name: Electrochemical CO2 capture for cement plants
opportunities.description: Electrochemical capture technology that removes CO2 from industrial flue gas with lower energy intensity than incumbent amine systems.
opportunities.notes: Strong climate impact and Europe market pull, but pilot deployment requires industrial partnerships.

opportunities.name: AI-driven thermal efficiency optimization for industrial furnaces
opportunities.description: Software and controls stack that optimizes combustion and heat transfer in industrial furnaces using physics-informed AI.
opportunities.notes: Excellent founder fit for Claudio and a very practical beachhead for a startup.

opportunities.name: Electromagnetic induction heating for decarbonized chemical reactors
opportunities.description: Inductive heating platform for reactors that could replace fossil-fired heating in industrial chemical processes.
opportunities.notes: Good fit for the original inductive heating theme and relevant to the founders' physics backgrounds.

opportunities.name: Optical methane sensing for oil and gas and agriculture
opportunities.description: Compact optical spectroscopy sensor for methane detection with strong monitoring and compliance use cases.
opportunities.notes: Strong match for Markus because of spectroscopy and hardware commercialization experience.

opportunities.name: Solid-state battery recycling and materials recovery
opportunities.description: Novel recycling process for recovering critical materials from battery waste with lower process intensity than incumbent approaches.
opportunities.notes: Potentially attractive but capital-intensive and likely better suited to a later-stage venture.
